hero.headline: Your Pool. *Our Promise.* Crystal Clear.
hero.subheadline: From weekly cleaning to liner replacement — we show up when we say we will.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every Pool. Every Week. Every Season.
services_section.subheading: From routine maintenance to major repairs — one team handles it all.

services.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
services.description: Skimming, vacuuming, chemical balancing. Your pool stays swim-ready while you stay poolside.

services.title: Pool Liner Replacement
services.description: Old liner wearing thin? We measure, install, and get you back in the water fast.

services.title: Chemical Treatment
services.description: pH, chlorine, alkalinity — all the chemistry so you don't have to think about it.

services.title: Equipment Repair
services.description: Pumps, filters, heaters. When something breaks, we fix it right the first time.

about.heading: Real People. Real Pools.
about.body: We're the Columbia pool team that answers the phone and shows up on schedule. One call gets you Everett and Cindy's full attention.

reviews.name: K. D.
reviews.text: Amazing from day one. Very responsive and communicated throughout the entire process. Ms. Cindy was professional and knowledgeable.

reviews.name: Amy B.
reviews.text: Used Pelican for new pool install — they were awesome! Finished product was beyond our expectations.

reviews.name: Robert P.
reviews.text: Very customer friendly! Great to work with. Didn't try to pressure us into something we didn't need.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving the Midlands
service_areas.subheading: Weekly routes throughout the Columbia area

cta.heading: Ready for Clear Water?
cta.body: Free quote on weekly service or one-time repairs. Call Everett and Cindy today.
